message.content:
PASS  
**Layout Description**:  
1. **Breadcrumb**: Present at top ("← Candidatures > CAND-2024-048").  
2. **Header Card**: Contains candidate avatar (initials "KK"), name "Kadiatou Konaté", status badge ("En attente"), dossier ID ("CAND-2024-048"), submission date ("01 Nov 2024"), and 3 action buttons (orange "Marquer incomplet", red "Rejeter", green "Valider").  
3. **Colored Top Border**: Orange border on the header card.  
4. **Stat Pills**: 4 pills ("Filière", "Niveau", "Pièces fournies", "Complétude IA").  
5. **2-Column Layout**:  
   - **Left**: "Informations personnelles" (6 info cards) + "Pièces justificatives" (grid of files).  
   - **Right**: "Synthèse analyse IA" (amber card with completeness bar) + "Historique des actions" (timeline with dots).  
6. **No Modal/Overlay**: Full-page view within dashboard (sidebar visible).
